armament_imprint.arcanum_unbound.amethys: Adds a resonant magical snap to clean hits.
armament_imprint.arcanum_unbound.bioferr: Calls bioferrite jaws from below the target on a clean hit.
armament_imprint.arcanum_unbound.diamond: A blunt jump in raw damage.
armament_imprint.arcanum_unbound.emerald: Punishes already weakened or marked foes.
armament_imprint.arcanum_unbound.gold.de: Fast follow-through and heavier full-strength hits.
armament_imprint.arcanum_unbound.ioperri: Detonates a compact wind-charge burst on impact.
armament_imprint.arcanum_unbound.iron.de: Steady extra force for dependable weapons.
Sharper work against undead and brittle targets.
armament_imprint.arcanum_unbound.redston: Rewards sprint pressure and attack tempo.
artifact_effect.arcanum_unbound.abyss_ve: Unique: below Y=0, ore mining can generate an echo shard.
artifact_effect.arcanum_unbound.blackblo: Finishing blows can make shadow burst outward.
artifact_effect.arcanum_unbound.blood_ti: Every strike taxes the wielder's health.
artifact_effect.arcanum_unbound.brittle_: The pickaxe wears down much faster.
Steals air from the target on hit.
artifact_effect.arcanum_unbound.collapsi: Bad breaks can shower the miner with debris and drag.
artifact_effect.arcanum_unbound.cursed_c: Weakens the wielder during work cycles.
artifact_effect.arcanum_unbound.deep_del: Below Y=0, mining grants extra sustain and survivability.
artifact_effect.arcanum_unbound.draining: Each hit burns the wielder's mana.
artifact_effect.arcanum_unbound.echo_sur: Mining sends out a pulse that reveals nearby ore and cavities.
artifact_effect.arcanum_unbound.executio: Deals extra finishing damage to wounded targets.
artifact_effect.arcanum_unbound.faultlin: Unique: major breaks can propagate forward as a chained fracture line.
artifact_effect.arcanum_unbound.feedback: Can strike the wielder with magic backlash.
artifact_effect.arcanum_unbound.fortune_: Sometimes yields an extra ore reward.
artifact_effect.arcanum_unbound.fragile_: Edge chips apart and may cut the wielder.
artifact_effect.arcanum_unbound.freezing: Applies deep freeze and movement lock.
artifact_effect.arcanum_unbound.geomance: Occasionally surges mining tempo with restorative earth pulses.
artifact_effect.arcanum_unbound.grief_ti: Strikes drag a wave of withering sorrow through the target.
artifact_effect.arcanum_unbound.hunger_b: Combat burns through food faster than it should.
artifact_effect.arcanum_unbound.loyal_ch: Lets you throw the sword like a trident. It returns after a delay.
Physical damage is reduced, but extra magic damage is added.
artifact_effect.arcanum_unbound.mana_sif: Ore mining restores part of your mana.
artifact_effect.arcanum_unbound.mana_sta: Builds cast cooldown backlash and leaks mana on hit.
artifact_effect.arcanum_unbound.misalign: Off-angle mining feels wrong and slows the rhythm.
artifact_effect.arcanum_unbound.mute_edg: The blade dulls magical follow-through and chained pressure.
artifact_effect.arcanum_unbound.nerve_st: Deep mining can send a painful shock back into the wielder.
artifact_effect.arcanum_unbound.ore_hung: Punishes empty mining cycles by draining mana.
artifact_effect.arcanum_unbound.phase_ri: Blink-slash style pressure that tears spacing around the target.
artifact_effect.arcanum_unbound.rattle.d: Hits shake armor, stance, and breathing.
artifact_effect.arcanum_unbound.resonant: Keeps mining tempo with short haste bursts.
artifact_effect.arcanum_unbound.reversal: Unique: the blade gives up normal damage and its right-click sweep transfers your active effects to the victim.
artifact_effect.arcanum_unbound.salt_dus: Fine dust dries the body out and taxes long mining sessions.
artifact_effect.arcanum_unbound.salvager: Recovered fragments sometimes repair the tool instead of wearing it down.
artifact_effect.arcanum_unbound.self_mar: Each committed strike leaves a curse-mark on the wielder too.
artifact_effect.arcanum_unbound.soulbind: On hit, restores mana and stabilizes your sigil strain.
artifact_effect.arcanum_unbound.thunderi: Can call lightning and strike with arcane energy.
The head cuts cleaner through waterlogged stone and current.
artifact_effect.arcanum_unbound.torpor.d: Aggressive swings can drag the wielder into sluggishness.
artifact_effect.arcanum_unbound.tunnel_s: Heavy swings can break a short tunnel straight ahead.
artifact_effect.arcanum_unbound.unstable: May backlash magical damage to the wielder.
artifact_effect.arcanum_unbound.vampiric: Returns part of dealt damage as health to the wielder.
Cuts harder through glowing or exposed targets.
artifact_effect.arcanum_unbound.vein_bre: Can shatter one adjacent ore block.
artifact_effect.arcanum_unbound.void_fra: Mining slowly destabilizes your sigil state.

gui.arcanum_unbound.abyss_gui.label_reci: The block absorbs your mana and stores it as energy. Recipes consume stored energy, not direct mana.
gui.arcanum_unbound.abyss_poem.label_but: But not the reason its arising.
gui.arcanum_unbound.abyss_poem.label_tha: that the world can be changed.
gui.arcanum_unbound.abyss_poem.label_the: The end belonged to the vessel.
gui.arcanum_unbound.abyss_poem.title: Abyss Echo
gui.arcanum_unbound.arcanum_guidebook.pa: Page %1$s/%2$s

This guidebook is a field manual. The buttons below jump straight to the opening progression, artifacts, bosses, and the real crafting pages.

Read the route first, then move on to recipes.

Core families:
- Ruin and Sever pressure kills.
- Anchor and Touch control space and duels.
- Time and Space break tempo.
- Pulse, Grasp, Bloom, and Veil lean into sculk, control, and deception.
- Resolve, Thread, Chrome, Maw, and Gyre reward cleanse, crowd shaping, crystal jaws, and violent vortex tempo.
- Domain, Wound, and Idol belong to the Abyss.

Forms:
- Burst: immediate release.
- Drain: pressure with sustain.
- Weave: mixed follow-through.
- Lance: ranged thrust.
- Ward: defensive conversion.
- Rune: delayed strike.
- Cascade: stretched chain along your aim.
- Orbit, Snare, and Trail add rotating, planted, and path-drawing casts.

Modifiers:
- Fracture: maximum pressure, maximum risk.
- Decay: attrition and corruption.
- Echo: follow-up casts.
- Phase-Lag: delayed waves.
- Resonance: rewards marked targets.
- Surge: speed and tempo.
- Sculk: infection and deep synergy.
- Hollow: escape and concealment.
- Verdict, Marionette, Overclock, and Druse push judgement, control strings, unsafe acceleration, and delayed crystal aftershocks.

Reading the preview:
- Mana cost shows the price of the current assembly.
- Instability shows how dangerous that assembly is to run.
- Stronger chains and delayed waves cost more than simple stable casts.

If the numbers climb too fast, simplify the build.

Sculk pathing:
- Pulse, Bloom, and the Sculk modifier grow stronger in the deep.
- Sculk Flash marks targets for several relics and finish tools.
- Darkness, sculk, and deepslate are not scenery in this mod; they are resources and threats.

Relic rule:
- Weapon relics awaken with 2 boons and 1 flaw.
- Wearable relics also carry 2 boons and 1 burden.
- Read the red line before you commit the slot.

A relic build is power with a price.

Deep finds:
- Remnant Tooth and Deep Reservoir are not crafted.
- Pale Needle, Ember Wake, Moon Dial, Director Cipher, and Black Box Relay only surface when deepslate is mined under the right pressure: motion, wounds, night, fresh casting, or a massive reserve.
- Bioferrite and Ioperrite geodes are rare warped cousins of amethyst. Their shards can be refined into the Maw, Gyre, and Druse sigils.
- The Deepwater Abyss is an ultra-rare ocean trench rich in coral, wrecks, and bad decisions.
- Lampspines patrol its deeper water: follow the glow only if you are ready to be dragged into the bite.

Structure finds:
- Warden Rib, Fracture Shackle, Choir Bell, and Catalyst Spine are dungeon relics.
- Search ruined and hostile places, not villages.
- If a relic feels too strong to craft, it probably has to be found.

Messura Altar and armaments:
- Enhancement raises the level of one existing trait.
- Infusion adds one new boon, but always adds a new drawback with it.
- Raw mana, experience, and your own mana are all part of the price.
- The Armament Imprint Template does NOT create a new weapon: place the template, your weapon, and a material into a smithing table to get the same weapon back with an imprint. Swords, axes, pickaxes, tridents, maces, and the artifact sword all qualify.
- Bioferrite imprints call fangs from below. Ioperrite imprints burst into a wind-charge detonation on contact.
- The template itself is only found in Ancient City chests, and even there the chance is low.

Do not infuse casually.

Wearable slots:
- Body Art: heavy body-bound relics with strong identity.
- Charm: mana tools, utility, and technical builds.
- Ring: compact relics for tempo, duels, and reactive pressure.
- Necklace: hunt, support, and pressure pieces.

Matching relic families can resonate together: Temporal, Sculk, Abyss, Ember, and Flow. Slot choice matters almost as much as the relic itself.

First steps:
- Raise your maximum mana before chasing dangerous sigils.
- Craft a Soul Resonator to unlock sigil assembly on G.
- Keep instability low while learning the system.

A careful caster grows faster than a reckless one.

Signature relics:
- Golden Spin marks a target and bites deeper when you throw from a steady moving line.
- Six Eyes Veil loves stable casting and turns low-health resolve into cleaner spell control.
- Pale Needle rewards movement. Ember Wake turns a bad health bar into a comeback window.
- Director Cipher lifts targets after a fresh cast. Black Box Relay spends stored overflow to keep you standing.

Mana economy:
- High maximum mana is still a privilege.
- Overflow can be stored separately, but it does not make you immortal.
- Instability, corruption, and cooldowns exist to stop infinite sustain loops.

Spend hard, but spend with intent.

Boss fights in co-op:
- Split roles instead of copying the same build three times.
- One player can control space while another spends burst windows.
- Shared mana support is strong, but panic spam still loses fights.

Good teams rotate pressure.

Craftable and non-craftable gear:
- Some items belong to recipes.
- Abyss rewards come from the Remnant choice, the Abyss Synthesizer, and the death of The Corrupted Trace.
- Some relics belong to mines, bosses, or structure chests.

If this book shows no craft, search for the source instead of the table.

The next pages are the real recipes.

Learn the route, gather the parts, forge the weapon you actually want, then shape the sigils around it.

Fracture Anchor:
- Craft the Structure Compass when you are ready to hunt late-game sites.
- It points toward the nearest Fracture Anchor.
- Search fresh land if the needle has nothing to lock onto.

Bring prepared sigils before you go.

Working with sigils:
- A Soul Resonator unlocks the sigil assembler.
- Put a core, one form, and up to three modifiers into the main slots.
- Use Z and X to swap saved presets.

The preview shows the live build: cost, instability, and the exact parts you are about to cast.

Entering the Abyss:
- Go below Y=0 with spare mana and a retreat plan.
- High instability opens stronger options, but it also raises the price of mistakes.
- Carry purification tools before you force long fights.

The deep rewards planning, not panic.

Abyssal Remnant:
- Keep moving around it instead of planting your feet.
- Short burst windows are safer than greedy spam.
- After the kill, a Pulse of the Abyss remains. Touch it for the Heart of the Abyss, or destroy it for a Piece of the Abyss.

Win the tempo first, then make the choice.

Heart of the Abyss:
- The heart is not crafted.
- Bring it to the Abyss Synthesizer.
- Echo shards turn it into an Enslaved Heart.
- Purified mana turns it into a Purified Heart.

The heart is a branching reward, not a table recipe.

Enslaved by the Abyss and The Corrupted Trace:
- The Enslaved Heart leads into the next Abyss phase.
- Survive Enslaved by the Abyss and the fight will break into The Corrupted Trace.
- The Corrupted Trace opens the Abyss Poem and leaves behind the Echo of the Abyss.

Save mana between phases. The Abyss prefers long fights.

Sigil basics:
- Core decides what the cast does.
- Form decides how it reaches the target.
- Modifiers decide risk, tempo, and secondary behavior.

A strong build is made from all three parts together.
gui.arcanum_unbound.messura_altar.apply_: A new (+) trait will be added, drawback auto
gui.arcanum_unbound.messura_altar.cost_i: Cost: 4 Mana + 6 XP levels + 70 player mana
gui.arcanum_unbound.messura_altar.cost_u: Cost: 2 Mana + 3 XP levels + 35 player mana
gui.arcanum_unbound.purifier_gui.label_a: Consumes mana every second while ingredients are present
Bonus: rolls 2 positive and 1 negative trait (base level I).
A heavy late-game relic that rewards high-mana builds and long fights.
item.arcanum_unbound.abyss_sigil_of_doma: An abyss pressure core that imposes a sculk-tainted zone and breaks enemy tempo.
item.arcanum_unbound.abyss_sigil_of_idol: A domination core that rewards long control windows and abyss worship.
item.arcanum_unbound.abyss_sigil_of_woun: A blood-soaked core built for sustained fracture and finishing pressure.
item.arcanum_unbound.armament_imprint_te: Does not craft a new weapon. It brands an existing one with a material imprint. Works on swords, axes, pickaxes, tridents, maces, and the artifact sword. Found in Ancient Cities.
item.arcanum_unbound.black_box_relay_rel: Spends stored overflow to keep you standing and blast space around you.

item.arcanum_unbound.moon_dial_relic.bon: Prefers night, depth, and wounded prey.
item.arcanum_unbound.pale_needle_relic.b: Rewards movement, lunging hits, and casts made on the move.

item.arcanum_unbound.pickaxe_artifact.un: This relic pickaxe has not awakened yet
item.arcanum_unbound.purified_heart_of_a: Cleared from the influence of the Sculk, but not from the effects of the Abyss

A volatile relic for disciplined casters. Strong tempo gain with real risk.

item.arcanum_unbound.sigil_of_anchor.too: Pins space and enemies in place, forcing awkward positioning.
item.arcanum_unbound.sigil_of_bloom.tool: Unfolds delayed sculk blooms and harvests resource through a lingering field.
item.arcanum_unbound.sigil_of_burst.tool: Instant release form. Maximum pressure at the point of cast.
item.arcanum_unbound.sigil_of_cascade.to: A cascading form that stretches the weave farther along your aim line.
item.arcanum_unbound.sigil_of_chrome.too: Floods the caster with metallic tempo and violent reflexes.
item.arcanum_unbound.sigil_of_decay.tool: Leans the fight toward attrition, survival, and corruption.
item.arcanum_unbound.sigil_of_drain.tool: Drain form. Steals tempo from the enemy and returns resource to the caster.
item.arcanum_unbound.sigil_of_druse.tool: Modifier born from both geodes. Leaves a delayed crystal pulse that bites and drags.
item.arcanum_unbound.sigil_of_echo.toolt: Adds chasing follow-up casts and extends combo length.
item.arcanum_unbound.sigil_of_fracture.t: Pushes power and risk to the limit. The most aggressive modifier in the matrix.
item.arcanum_unbound.sigil_of_grasp.tool: Pulls enemies inward, crushes mobility, and keeps the fight on your terms.
item.arcanum_unbound.sigil_of_gyre.toolt: Ioperrite-forged core. Breaks into a wind gyre that drags bodies off line.
item.arcanum_unbound.sigil_of_hollow.too: Thins the cast into concealment and emergency disengage.
item.arcanum_unbound.sigil_of_lance.tool: Turns the cast into a ranged thrust along your line of sight.
item.arcanum_unbound.sigil_of_marionette: Hooks targets on invisible strings and drags them out of line.
item.arcanum_unbound.sigil_of_maw.toolti: Bioferrite-forged core. Raises crystal jaws from the ground beneath the cast.
item.arcanum_unbound.sigil_of_orbit.tool: Wraps the cast around the caster in a rotating ring.
Pushes the cast past safe limits for speed at a price.
Shifts part of the cast into delayed waves and false punish windows.
item.arcanum_unbound.sigil_of_pulse.tool: A sculk shockwave that hits with sound, darkness, and tempo breaks.
item.arcanum_unbound.sigil_of_resolve.to: Purges burdens from the caster and turns them into force.
Rewards already marked targets and lengthens chain casting.
item.arcanum_unbound.sigil_of_ruin.toolt: A direct destructive pulse. Best for raw pressure and finishing blows.
item.arcanum_unbound.sigil_of_rune.toolt: A delayed form: lays down a rune and strikes again after a short delay.
item.arcanum_unbound.sigil_of_sculk.tool: Infuses a cast with sculk: more readable marks, flashes, and deep synergies.
item.arcanum_unbound.sigil_of_sever.tool: A cutting sigil that thrives on tempo, combos, and executions.
item.arcanum_unbound.sigil_of_snare.tool: Plants the spell on a point and lets it spring shut later.
item.arcanum_unbound.sigil_of_space.tool: Breaks space, shifts positions, and ruins safe angles.
item.arcanum_unbound.sigil_of_surge.tool: Raises tempo, mobility, and aggression for the next casting cycle.
item.arcanum_unbound.sigil_of_thread.too: Draws hostile targets together and tightens the battlefield.
item.arcanum_unbound.sigil_of_time.toolt: Stops time for everyone except the caster. Expensive, but decisive.
item.arcanum_unbound.sigil_of_touch.tool: A precise contact sigil for control, resource exchange, and duels.
item.arcanum_unbound.sigil_of_trail.tool: Stretches the cast into a burning line through space.
item.arcanum_unbound.sigil_of_veil.toolt: Ruins combat readability through blindness, concealment, and escape pressure.
item.arcanum_unbound.sigil_of_verdict.to: Rewards pressure on marked or weakened prey.
item.arcanum_unbound.sigil_of_ward.toolt: A defensive form that converts casting into survival and positional hold.
item.arcanum_unbound.sigil_of_weave.tool: Hybrid chain form that blends strike, control, and follow-through tempo.
item.arcanum_unbound.six_eyes_veil.bonus: Bonus: rolls 2 positive and 1 negative trait (base level I).
item.arcanum_unbound.soul_slice.tooltip_: After consuming, grants stored power and a one-time cheat death.
item.arcanum_unbound.structure_compass.d: Always searches for the nearest Fracture Anchor and points to it.

message.arcanum_unbound.abyss_choice: The Pulse of the Abyss answers: touch it for the Heart of the Abyss, or destroy it for a Piece of the Abyss.
message.arcanum_unbound.abyss_heart_synt: The Heart of the Abyss responds to the Abyss Synthesizer: cleanse it with purified mana or bind it with echo shards.
message.arcanum_unbound.abyss_return_fai: The altar finds no stable path back.
message.arcanum_unbound.abyss_return_wro: This altar only answers within the Abyss.
message.arcanum_unbound.abyss_returned: The altar tears a path back to the Overworld.
message.arcanum_unbound.cast_blocked_tim: Time is stopped. Casting is blocked.
message.arcanum_unbound.cast_not_enough_: Not enough mana for this cast.
message.arcanum_unbound.cast_on_cooldown: Sigil weave is unstable. Cooldown: %1$s ticks.
message.arcanum_unbound.heart_sickness_o: You feel the sickness fading... for now
message.arcanum_unbound.messura_altar_ne: Place a relic blade or relic pickaxe into the slot.
message.arcanum_unbound.messura_altar_no: No upgradable trait levels remain on this relic.
Cannot apply drawback: no compatible negative trait found.
Cannot add a positive trait: pool exhausted.
message.arcanum_unbound.soul_resonator_a: You feel something stirring in your soul
message.arcanum_unbound.soul_slice_cheat: Cheat death activated. The soul fragment is spent.
Cheat death primed: the next lethal blow will be denied.
message.arcanum_unbound.soul_slice_consu: You consumed a soul slice and gained %1$s max mana.
message.arcanum_unbound.soul_slice_creat: Soul split at %2$s%%. Stored power: %1$s mana.
message.arcanum_unbound.soul_slice_need_: Soul slicing requires 1 amethyst and at least 500 maximum mana.
Not enough maximum mana. You need at least 500.
A full reserve can condense into a brief shell of protection.
relic_common.arcanum_unbound.anchored.de: Each relic reduces abyss corruption pressure.
Dark, deep places feed a colder and faster tempo.
Casting cleanly sharpens your movement and shortens dead time.
Each equipped relic slightly increases the total mana pool.
relic_common.arcanum_unbound.overflow_sy: Overflow returns to the core more cleanly after pressure.
relic_common.arcanum_unbound.quickened.d: Each relic slightly lowers cast cost and cooldown.
relic_common.arcanum_unbound.wardskin.de: Recent casting briefly wraps the owner in a thin protective layer.
relic_drawback.arcanum_unbound.ashen_tas: Playing too safe leaves a cold ash in the mouth and the veins.
relic_drawback.arcanum_unbound.board_noi: Low mana in a crowded fight turns thought into static.
A charged ring hums loud enough for danger to answer back.
relic_drawback.arcanum_unbound.brine_lun: Dry sprints leave your breath ragged and your mana leaking.
relic_drawback.arcanum_unbound.burning_s: High instability turns sharpened sight into pain and mana loss.
When the fire dies and you play too safely, mana bleeds away.
relic_drawback.arcanum_unbound.crackback: If the shield fails, the blow rebounds into your own instability.
relic_drawback.arcanum_unbound.crooked_t: The line bends off true, shortening the spiral and dulling the hit.
relic_drawback.arcanum_unbound.drag_hand: Every throw pulls on your stance and lengthens the recovery.
relic_drawback.arcanum_unbound.empty_she: Standing still without pressure leaves you exposed and weakened.
High instability makes distant space answer with nausea and drag.
relic_drawback.arcanum_unbound.frail_fra: Cuts raw vitality and makes the wearer easier to break in long fights.
relic_drawback.arcanum_unbound.glass_ner: Low health makes every mistake hit harder.
relic_drawback.arcanum_unbound.heavy_str: Active cooldowns weigh on the body and slow movement.
relic_drawback.arcanum_unbound.heavy_wel: A larger mana reservoir refills more slowly on its own.
relic_drawback.arcanum_unbound.hollow_ch: The rib protects after casting, but it costs raw vitality.
relic_drawback.arcanum_unbound.hungry_ec: Power echoes back as mana thirst and real hunger.
relic_drawback.arcanum_unbound.locked_he: An empty overflow loop leaves the body heavy and slow.
relic_drawback.arcanum_unbound.logic_rot: High instability corrupts sight and drains mana.
relic_drawback.arcanum_unbound.loud_cast: Recent casts glow and reveal your position.
relic_drawback.arcanum_unbound.loud_tell: Recent casts leave a bright tell that gives your position away.
relic_drawback.arcanum_unbound.mana_leak: Recent casting bleeds mana away until you let the system cool.
relic_drawback.arcanum_unbound.open_guar: A missed throw slows you down and leaves you exposed on cooldown.
relic_drawback.arcanum_unbound.petal_cut: Protective shells shatter harder and feed instability.
relic_drawback.arcanum_unbound.predator_: Without fresh prey, the tooth leaves the owner hungry on the surface.
relic_drawback.arcanum_unbound.red_dream: Open daylight needles the mind, adding darkness and instability.
relic_drawback.arcanum_unbound.restless_: Away from sculk, the heart grows noisy and stirs extra instability.
relic_drawback.arcanum_unbound.rift_sick: Too much strain leaves the body dizzy and unstable.
relic_drawback.arcanum_unbound.smoke_bur: Each cast is cheaper, but the smoke pushes instability upward.
relic_drawback.arcanum_unbound.spine_fev: On sculk and under dangerous strain, the spine flares back into its owner.
relic_drawback.arcanum_unbound.split_knu: Close-range hits crack through your own guard more easily.
relic_drawback.arcanum_unbound.split_tit: If you ignore Fracture, the shackle makes your casting heavier and less stable.
relic_drawback.arcanum_unbound.stagnant_: Stored overflow makes the body heavy and slows movement.
Open daylight turns the ring bitter and drains mana away.
relic_drawback.arcanum_unbound.surface_h: Open daylight makes the locket feed on the owner's mana.
relic_drawback.arcanum_unbound.thin_rese: Mana returns faster, but the total reserve is smaller.
relic_drawback.arcanum_unbound.thin_skin: The shard makes escape easier, but every incoming hit lands harder.
relic_drawback.arcanum_unbound.time_debt: The clock drags on your rhythm and stretches baseline sigil cooldown.
relic_drawback.arcanum_unbound.tolling_s: Casting invites a brief silence that dulls offense.
relic_drawback.arcanum_unbound.unstable_: Adds flat instability to every build you run.
relic_drawback.arcanum_unbound.voice_cra: Every cast strains the ring and roughens the spell line.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.abyss_sipho: Below ground, grants extra mana and survivability.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.afterimage_: Surviving the first hit leaves behind a phantom step to reposition from.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.ally_tuning: Periodically shares mana with nearby allies.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.black_box_s: Stored overflow can burst outward to keep you alive and blast space around you.
Lowers cast cost and instability while boosting baseline casting power.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.borrowed_ho: Shortens spent cooldowns while quietly charging a debt to the future.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.boss_bite.d: Hits and executions against abyss bosses strike noticeably harder.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.cancer_bloo: Under heavy strain on sculk, releases an infection burst into nearby enemies.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.choral_wall: Crowds of bodies or echoes harden into a choir-born barrier.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.chorus_step: A bad hit can knock you sideways through a singing fold in space.
Low health turns retaliation into cinders and comeback pressure.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.cold_bank.d: Stillness lets spare mana settle into a deep reserve.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.cool_head.d: Further trims sigil recovery while instability stays low.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.corruption_: Reduces the rate of abyss corruption growth.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.deep_cister: A capped reserve can overflow into a second hidden basin.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.deep_feed.d: Deepslate mining sustains the owner and can reveal the relic itself.
Kills in the deep accelerate tempo and heal the owner.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.echo_chorus: Extends Echo and Resonance chain length.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.eclipse_pul: Darkness tightens your casting and sharpens the follow-through.
Old smoke peels one curse away before the embers go dark.
Low health ignites a comeback window with mana, fireward, and pressure.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.fear_window: Punishes targets already affected by Sculk Flash.
Sculk contact can burst outward into a sudden skulk flash.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.fracture_gr: Softens the mana and cooldown burden of Fracture casts.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.fracture_ma: Fracture casts mark and weaken nearby enemies.
Casting from a full reserve grows a brief shell of brittle radiance.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.golden_rati: Marked targets suffer spiraling Golden Ratio damage.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.grave_reson: Kills on sculk-flashed or deep targets restore mana.
Darkness and depth feed a dense, predatory swell of mana.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.gravewire.d: Kills in the deep charge the ring with a waiting shock.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.greater_ves: Greatly raises the owner's maximum mana.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.heartbeat_m: Mining deepslate near sculk lowers strain and feeds mana back.
Silence and stillness wrap the body in warden-like cover.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.hush_thread: A fresh cast ties the next strike to a choking dark hush.
A clean kill leaves behind a short, violent rhythm window.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.limit_threa: Perfect focus trims the seam between cast, thought, and impact.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.long_line.d: Thrown from a mount or a steady moving line, the spiral flies farther and bites harder.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.mana_flowin: Smoothly restores mana after recent casting.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.mirror_knot: A shielded body sends a splinter of pain back along the line.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.moon_hunt.d: Night and buried dark turn kills into speed, healing, and mana.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.needle_danc: Movement and fresh casts prime lunging hits and evasive tempo.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.overflow_ke: Excess overflow mana is preserved and slowly returned to the main pool.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.overflow_re: Creates a separate overflow mana reservoir.
Incoming damage charges an emergency smoke window.
Nearby sculk and prey begin to answer the relic?s heartbeat.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.rewind_guar: After time resumes, restores mana and grants a short defensive burst.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.seam_skip.d: Fresh casts open a narrow seam you can step through with the next hit.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.seized_vect: Fresh casts let you lift bodies and hang in the air a moment longer.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.shadow_refu: The next cast after triggering is cheaper and hides the owner in invisibility.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.shard_waltz: Fractures around the wearer start to move like a rehearsed dance.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.six_eyes.de: Every fourth stable cast cycle partially refunds mana.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.smoke_purif: Periodically clears weakness, darkness, and wither.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.sonic_barri: Grants damage resistance after recent casting.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.steel_retur: Finishing a marked target restores mana and repairs the disc.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.time_calm.d: Gradually lowers instability and trims remaining sigil cooldown.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.torrent_ste: A fast cast can turn directly into a flow-step reposition.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.undertow.de: Wet targets feed the ring and lose their footing.
Stored overflow spins back into tempo and movement.
relic_unique.arcanum_unbound.veiled_pact: Below half health, spellwork becomes cheaper, calmer, and faster.
subtitle.arcanum_unbound.abyss_welcome: You have come far, but your path will break here...
